programme.desc: The traffic cops tackle a dodgy driver, the detectives smash a smuggling operation, and the Chief bravely faces up to encountering his ex-wife.

programme.desc: Newly promoted actual PC Ken Beattie now finds himself called upon to provide a character reference

programme.title: Party Down
programme.desc: The Party Down team caters a senior singles mixer hosted by Pepper McMasters. Constance has an awkward encounter with an old flame and Casey seeks relationship advice.

programme.title: Party Down
programme.desc: A land tycoon expects flawless service from the Party Down crew, but Ron's dreams of success threaten to ruin everything. Kyle makes a friend whose lifestyle he hopes to emulate

programme.title: What Happens In Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly get married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot.

programme.title: Most Allergic Kid In The World
programme.desc: Jesse, plagued by severe allergies, avoids romance. When his childhood crush Avery reenters his life, he faces his fears and societal pressures, ultimately choosing love and finding a partner who embraces his unique challenges.

programme.title: Girl Fakes Rich To Marry Billionaire
programme.desc: Lily, forced to find a rich husband for her family's debt, fakes a relationship with Jack, who's also pushed into it. Their fake bond blossoms into real love, leading them to overcome lies and build a life together.

programme.title: Student Takes IQ Serum To Impress Girl
programme.desc: Chad, a lazy law student, uses a "genius serum" to ace exams and impress a girl. When the serum's effects fade, he faces academic and financial ruin, forcing him to abandon shortcuts and embrace hard work, ultimately finding true success.

programme.title: Guy Has World's Worst Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: People-pleasing Charlie's lie about breaking up with his girlfriend, Rayna, spirals out of control, leading to chaotic encounters, a bizarre haircut, and a trashed apartment. Ultimately, his deceit is exposed, costing him both Rayna and new interest Zoe, but teaching him the value of honesty.

programme.title: Kid Builds Secret Tunnel To School
programme.desc: Jay, now a social media star, gets suspended, leading him to prank his new principal. His pranks backfire as a strict new principal takes over, trapping students. Jay and his friends unite, digging an escape tunnel, and restoring order to the school.

programme.title: Kid Gets World's Strictest Family
programme.desc: Sasha, a rebellious teen, is sent to her aunt and uncle's mansion for a "vacation" to learn discipline. Tricked into babysitting her conniving cousin Pearl, Sasha faces escalating pranks and blackmail, ultimately leading to a chaotic party and a shocking twist.

programme.title: Teen & Grandma Swap Lives For 1 Week
programme.desc: Teen Rosie and Grandma Louise swap lives for a week. Rosie navigates assisted living's challenges while Louise endures high school bullying. They uncover betrayal and embrace empathy, learning that understanding others' struggles fosters open hearts.

programme.title: Girl Goes Undercover On Boys' Basketball Team
programme.desc: Scrawny Joel, an unexpected basketball hero, and his athletic sister Rachel, trade places to navigate high school, basketball, and social challenges. Their scheme, filled with hilarious mishaps, ultimately leads to self-discovery and triumph on and off the court.

programme.title: Girls Mom Goes Undercover In High School
programme.desc: Overprotective mom Carol secretly enrolls in her daughter Nicole's high school to shield her from bullies. Her disguise and interventions cause chaos, exposing family secrets and school corruption, ultimately empowering Nicole to stand up for herself.

programme.title: Friends Live In Viral Prank House
programme.desc: Jason, a prank-obsessed YouTuber, creates chaos for his friends with elaborate pranks. After his friends retaliate with an epic prank that costs him a dream deal, Jason learns a valuable lesson about empathy, only to discover their prank was a setup for his biggest success yet.

programme.title: Girl's Debt Magically Paid Off
programme.desc: Jenny, blaming bad luck for her misfortunes, is conned by her best friend, Savannah, pretending to be a fortune teller. Jenny's "curse" is lifted, motivating her to work hard and turn her life around, ultimately realizing her destiny is her own choice.

programme.title: Influencer Stalked By Fan
programme.desc: A famous influencer's family is terrorized by an obsessed fan. Her husband, initially dismissive, realizes the danger. He bravely confronts the stalker, saving his family and highlighting that true strength lies in unity and protecting loved ones.

programme.title: Poor and Rich Girls Want To Swap Lives
programme.desc: Two teens, rich Estrella and poor Maria, swap lives for a month, each believing the other's life is better. They quickly learn that wealth and perceived freedom come with their own challenges, finding appreciation for their own families.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode we hear from Jamie Hull, a former British serviceman. Jamie tells the incredible story of how he survived a plane crash when his cockpit caught fire at 1000ft.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode, we sit down with forensic pathologist Dr Richard Shepherd, who tells us about his job, the truth behind Princess Diana's fatal accident and how he deals with the smell of a dead body.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Crime Scene Cleaner Ben Giles talks about how he set up his own Crime Scene Cleaning business in the early 2000s. He tells us the most disgusting thing he's ever seen and explains why he does a job that 99% of people couldn't stomach.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: John Massey, at one point England's longest-serving prisoner, spent an astonishing 43 years behind bars. John candidly shares his life story with us, including the murder that led him to prison, his four daring escapes, and his eventual release.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this weeks episode of Minutes With we sat down with Mirsad Solakovic, a Bosnian refugee who was forced to flee to the UK with his family. Mirsad tells us about the torture he suffered at the hands of his Serbian school teacher, the time he spent in a concentration camp and how this gave him PTSD.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Actor Adam Pearson grew up with a genetic condition called neurofibromatosis, which causes the growth of tumours on nerve tissues on his face and upper body. Today, he tells us about his youth, coping with bullying and his successful acting career.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this week's episode of Minutes With, prison governor Vanessa Frake reveals what it's like inside the UK's most dangerous prisons. She opens up about meeting notorious serial murderers Rose West and Myra Hindley, along with the creative ways prisoners smuggle contraband like drugs and weapons into jails.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: The ‪Sidemen‬ settle some of the internet's biggest debates! KSI‬ and Simon team up against ‪Ethan and ‪Harry as they debate being more talented than MrBeast, their biggest icks and whether ChrisMD is a better footballer than Simon!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Man City legend Micah Richards and former Liverpool and Spurs player Jamie Redknapp debate some of the Premier League and England's biggest football debates, such as who is England's Greatest Ever Player: Rooney, Kane, or Beckham?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: In this very funny episode, Jake Gyllenhaal and Gabrielle Union do incredible impressions, Jake reveals his surprising pineapple-on-pizza take, and Gabrielle tries British chocolate for the first time. Oppenheimer stars Emily Blunt and Matt Damon debate whether British food is better than American food and whether you should clap when your plane lands. Matt also reveals why kissing Scarlett Johansson was 'hell'!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Eddie Hearn and Frank Warren debate some of boxing's biggest debates. The two promoters discuss Anthony Joshua vs Tyson Fury? Which Premier League player would make the best boxer? As well as debates about Jake Paul and MrBeast.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: In this episode of Snack Wars, Måneskin frontman Damiano David dives fork-first into a head-to-head battle of Italian vs UK snacks and the results might surprise you. He even reveals his bad boy food habits… let's just say chocolate is his weakness. In this episode, David Corenswet gets his first ever taste of a Greggs sausage roll, while Nicholas Hoult tries to convince him that British chocolate deserves more respect, and the two debate which country's fake cheese is more questionable.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: The hilarious Stephen Graham decides which region of the UK has the better snacks... North or South? He has a great time sampling the likes of saveloy, gingerbread and jellied eels and sparks the age-old debate about the pronunciation of 'scone'. Singer and songwriter Burna Boy tries some of Britain's most iconic meals in Snack Wars, comparing them to foods from his birthplace of Nigeria. He tackles cauliflower cheese, recalls the time Pot Noodle 'saved his life' and drinks a lot of Pimm's.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: JoJo Siwa dives into the ultimate UK vs USA snack showdown! She falls head over heels for the iconic British Curly Wurly and just casually pulls out a photo of Love Island's Chris Hughes' eyes that she's been carrying in her pocket all day.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Cass work together to save a racehorse with a career-ending condition, while the arrival of a former girlfriend forces Tim to see his current relationship in a new light. programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Georgie's school project on Val Stanton inspires her to take a risk with Adam. Meanwhile, a shocking announcement from Caleb makes Ty question why Amy hasn't told him some important news. And Jack hires new help for Heartland after a close call puts several horses in danger.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Lou returns from New York she is forced to confront two interlopers: Heartland's new ranch hand, and a trendy food truck that is threatening Maggie's business. programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou finds herself trapped at the Dude Ranch with Mitch, the new ranch hand, and they both reveal the circumstances of their recent pasts. programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: While trying to help Cass learn to handle a spirited horse, Amy discovers there is more riding on their success than she initially realized. Meanwhile, when Remi destroys his new fly-fishing bait supplies, Jack holds onto his grudge against the dog in order to win a bet with Lisa.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Orang-utan Oshine is introduced to two youngsters, and it's an emotional day when the ugly monkeys, from a research facility in Scotland, go outside for the first time.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Hananya is busy showing everyone who is boss, whilst baby woolly Diego joins his family in the big enclosure, and golden-cheeked gibbon Zoey is pregnant.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: There is bad news for the stump-tailed macaques who have recently arrived at the park from a lab facility in Scotland. Wildlife vet John Lewis pays a special visit to give them a health check, but has to call in the services of a top London dentist when he realises they have serious dental problems.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Jeremy is on a mission to coax overweight Oshine into the great outdoors, but to get to the enclosure the big orang-utan has to navigate a series of tunnels, and she is not keen. So Jeremy has to go in on his hands and knees to guide her through. Meanwhile there is trouble at the stumpie house when the boys finally meet the girls. Sam proves a big hit, but Jonathan gets over excited and has to cool off.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The team are in Lebanon on a rescue mission to pick up a very lonely chimp. Kiki has lived on her own in a cage for the last eight years, but there are problems when it is realised that her cage has rusted closed and the team have to resort to drastic measures to get her out. Once at the airport they have to keep Kiki calm or she won't be allowed to board the flight for the UK.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Chimp Kiki finally arrives at the park after a mammoth journey from the Middle East, but having lived on her own in a cage in Beirut for the last eight years, she is unnerved by the sounds of the other chimps in the room next door. Meanwhile there is great excitement at the golden-cheeked gibbon house with news of Zoey's new arrival in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: New arrival Kiki meets Patricia. Having lived on her own, Kiki is not used to other chimps so the team are not sure how she will react to others of her own kind. Meanwhile, overweight orang-utan Oshine has a special visitor from South Africa - but will she remember her? Woolly monkey Bueno has to have emergency dental treatment when the veterinary team discover he has several rotten teeth.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Meet the new wild warrior volunteers, as they are introduced to Imire's extended animal family and they get to understand how the conservation program works. We get a good understanding of our feature volunteer as she prepares herself for a 3 month stay. What makes her tick and why is she dedicated to helping these wonderful animals? Getting dirty is part of the job as the volunteers tackle the paddock cleaning tasks. One of the highlights in this episode is attempting to catch and relocate a massive python that tried to eat Judy's dog and duiker!

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episode we witness a desperate mission to save a spooked impala that got it's leg caught in a fence. Luckily the volunteers reacted quickly and made a plan to help the impala. One of the highlights for any volunteer at Imire is to interact with the incredibly clever elephants. Daily training is done the elephants to hone their skills. It's hard to believe but these gentle giants can actually track poachers. And, there is always time for fun tasks. It is vital for the volunteers to bond with each other so the Imire management team, devise amazing fun tasks, including this one, whereby 2 teams are challenged to build their own raft and race across the dam. After many laughs there is one clear winner.

programme.title: Marine Mammals
programme.desc: From giant sperm whales to dramatic humpbacks and playful dolphins, we can't resist the endless charms of marine mammals.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore how different animal species react to impending death. We explore the factors that lead animals to their final resting places: disease, injury, predation, drought, famine.

programme.title: Indochina's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Indochina three ancient kingdoms, Laos, Vietnam and Cambodia, linked by one great river: the mighty Mekong. A mystical land shaped by the forces of the monsoon. A region ravaged by war but, like a Phoenix, risen from the ashes. Within its boundaries can be found one tenth of the world's species, and some of the richest ecosystems on the planet. This is the land of the Mother River, one of the most bio diverse regions on Earth.

programme.title: Glorious Grasslands
programme.desc: Savanna, prairie, meadow: grassland goes by many names. Seas of green, dominated by one of the most successful plant species. It's so hardy and productive that it can survive flooding, drought and fires, managing to feed vast animal communities. What's more, it's not just a food source, it's also a theatre many of nature's most dramatic spectacles play out in this breathtaking wilderness. We literally need grasslands to breathe, but they're a vital resource for some of our most exciting wildlife!

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Meet the new wild warrior volunteers, as they are introduced to Imire's extended animal family and they get to understand how the conservation program works. programme.title: Marine Mammals

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The Parque Nacional Peneda-Gerês is the only national park in Portugal. An area of almost 700 square kilometers, located in the extreme north of Portugal. Barren and rocky ridges in the plateaus, contrast with large forests and lush ground vegetation in deep valleys, crossed by lakes and rivers. The park is known for its oak forests, which are predominantly pedunculate and Pyrenean oaks. Among the typical animals of the park are the small Garrano ponies, a very old breed of horse and the only one in Europe that still lives in the wild.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: The highest mountain range in Portugal is the Serra da Estrela. The episode embarks on a voyage of discovery to adventurous rock formations and villages steeped in tradition. The nature park is the largest protected area on the Iberian peninsula. In the mountain range we accompany the young scientist Ana Matos, who wants to breathe new life into old traditions, and cheese maker Maria Natália Lopes. She watches over more than 350 sheeps.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: In the southwest of Portugal lies the little known Parque Natural do Sudoeste Alentejano e Costa Vicentina. It encompasses a narrow coastal strip that runs along the coast to the south of Portugal. Sparsely populated, this coastal region, which was placed under protection in 1988, is considered one of the last intact ecosystems in Europe. The steep cliffs, the almost constant wind and high waves have ensured that mass tourism has not gained a foothold here. There are still near-natural forests and a diverse bird life.

programme.title: Portugal's Nature Parks
programme.desc: Madeira - Portugal's autonomous island in the Atlantic Ocean, is closer to the African coast than to the mother country Portugal, from which it is separated by about 900 kilometers. The island's name comes from Portuguese sailors who claimed the uninhabited isle for themselves in 1419. Madeira means wood and that was available in abundance. Almost the entire surface was covered by dense forest. Since 1982, two-thirds of the landscape has been protected.

programme.title: Close up with Hippos
programme.desc: This nature documentary shows the many different sides of the Hippo's lives on one September day in two iconic African locations: the Masai Mara-Nationalpark in Kenya, also the setting for the largest annual animal migration on the planet – one and a half million wildebeests and zebras migrate from the Serengeti to Kenya during this time.

programme.title: Strandwolf
programme.desc: She moves through the seal colony on Namibia's wild Skeleton Coast with purpose and focus, gingerly stepping around the adults who snap at her heels. She's searching for smaller prey. Following her is a young German field scientist, Ingrid Wiesel, who has now spent 17 years with Tosca's clan tracking, observing, and learning everything she can about one of the world's least understood and most unusual predators.

programme.title: Expedia's Super Supper Club
programme.desc: Join Chef Sara Aqel as she explores Jordan's northern produce, landscapes, and historical sights before hosting an idyllic dinner at Amman's Citadel.

programme.title: Expedia's Super Supper Club
programme.desc: Join Chef Ali Ghzawi as he takes us on a journey through Jordan's southern sights of Petra, Aqaba, and Wadi Rum, using the best local produce, for a dinner at the Dead Sea.

programme.title: Epic Exploring
programme.desc: Local Exploring in Tokyo is like nothing else. Josh and Lexi Limitless visit the crowded streets, a screaming Monster Café and an abandoned ‘Love Hotel'.

programme.title: Travels with the Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris visits China and explores a masterpiece of history , is shadowed by giants on Australia's Great Barrier Reef, takes on a photo challenge in his own Bondi backyard, and joins a safari to a coastal community, well off the grid.

programme.title: Travels with the Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris takes on one of the world's most amazing cities, in search of the old and the new, meets an island local that makes everyone smile, and is on the trail of the elusive Aussie platypus.

programme.title: Travels with the Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris cruises China's mighty Yangtze river, explores the spooky tunnels beneath the bustling streets of Sydney, discovers the Aussie travel spot that is almost too good to be true and faces a test to enter heaven!

programme.title: Travels with the Bondi Vet
programme.desc: Chris meets China's cricket king, muscles up for an English challenge, has a fashion makeover in Vietnam, spends a day on the Great Barrier Reef and meets his mini match in a fellow animal lover and wildlife warrior.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.desc: It's an incalculable undertaking to understand the cuisine of India the depth of it is simply massive. Over the next 2 episodes, Sashi will explore the country from coast to coast, to understand how the cuisine changes as the kilometers rack up This episode starts off with a rendezvous with Mumbai's hottest chef, Prateek Sadhu. Sashi takes an inside look into how the city's most popular restaurant, Masque does their signature 8 hands collaborative event. With Prateek and his star studded guest chefs, Matt Orlando from Copenhagen and Ivan Brehm from Nouri in Singapore the trio head to Delhi for an ingredients scoring mission. From biodynamic farms in the outskirts to the old Delhi markets hunting down spices - Sashi takes a detailed look at how these high end collaborations come together, from start to finish.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.desc: The India foodie excursion continues. This time, Sashi is in the eastern fringe of India. Revelling in the colonial splendor of Kolkata, exploring bustling fish markets and a unique story of India's only Chinatown. Sashi then tracks down south to Orissa where he comes across a once in a lifetime opportunity and access to Puri's Jagannath temple's maha bhog the massive effort of religious food offerings made daily to Lord Jagannath, one of the world's largest kitchen operations that feed over 100,000 people every single day! Following recipes and ingredients that have been unchanged for millenia - a stark contrast to the previous episode showcasing Masque and their cutting edge techniques. It just goes to show how diverse India's culinary spectrum really is!

programme.title: Paradise Kitchen Bali
programme.desc: Lauren dives into the fascinating world of mushrooms, exploring their flavors, textures, and health benefits. She shows how to make savory mushroom sausage rolls and delicious mushroom steaks, showcasing the versatility of these earthy ingredients.

programme.title: Marketplace Europe
programme.desc: We hit the red carpet for a look at the state of Europe's film industry, from Venice to London. In the face of economic uncertainty and rising tariffs, how will the creative industry respond? As countries like Italy and the UK replace Hollywood as the go-to destinations for on-location shooting, we speak to some of the major players in the industry to find out how Europe has catapulted itself forward, and whether it can stay at the front of the pack.

This special program brings you front and center to the music and memories you love.-SMTOWN LIVE 2025 in L.A. programme.title: U-KNOW 'I-KNOW' Spoiler Film
programme.desc: Clues like word puzzles and coins, combined with the rhythm of “Body Language,” hint at the overall concept of the album.TVXQ! U-Know released a spy-style ‘I-KNOW' Spoiler Film to heighten anticipation for his upcoming comeback.

programme.title: U-KNOW 'Body Language' MV
programme.desc: The music video artistically portrays villagers coming together through dance, with choreography by Vata of WeDemBoyz and RIEHATA of RIEHATOKYO. “Body Language” is a dance track blending blues, funk, and retro hip-hop, delivering a message of unity through dance. TVXQ! U-Know's lively vocals and performance amplify the song's upbeat and cheerful energy.TVXQ! U-Know kicks off his first full-length album ‘I-KNOW' promotions with the pre-release of the new track “Body Language.”

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Mood Sampler #1 | Chapter 1. How2getHearts
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' first mood sampler for their debut mini album 'FOCUS' features a rulebook concept video that shows how the members "earn hearts." The group's vibrant visuals are paired with STELLA's captivating English narration.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Mood Sampler #2 | Chapter 2. Hard2Hide
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' second mood sampler for their debut mini album 'FOCUS' captures the members expressing the range of emotions experienced when falling in love, such as excitement, imagination, jealousy, sadness, and obsession.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Trailer
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' first mini album FOCUS features a total of six tracks, including the title track “FOCUS,” the single “STYLE,” and the pre-release song “Pretty Please,” showcasing a diverse musical palette. The album trailer captures the members' bold and free-spirited sides as they play around and dance together in a quiet space. In the latter part of the video, the title track “FOCUS” audio and part of the choreography are revealed, raising anticipation for the new release.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' MV
programme.desc: Its lyrics sensually express the feeling of being completely focused on someone, offering a fresh glimpse into Hearts2Hearts' unique appeal. Hearts2Hearts' first mini album title track “FOCUS” is a house genre-based song that features a vintage piano riff and an addictive melody, showcasing the group's cool and chic vocal charm. Set against a school backdrop, the music video delicately captures the complex emotions between the members. Choreographed by Jo Na-In, the performance delivers a sleek and sophisticated atmosphere.

programme.title: aespa Music Video Compilation

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: "Sweet Dreams" is a soothing show with gentle lullabies and serene animations. It helps kids relax and fall asleep with ease, making bedtime an enjoyable and comforting experience for the whole family.

programme.title: Animal Sounds
programme.desc: This show blends fun and learning by introducing kids to a musical world where animals take center stage. With catchy tunes, children explore songs about pets and wildlife, fostering care and empathy while enjoying an universe of music and adventure!

programme.title: Let's Play Everyday
programme.desc: This show features nursery songs perfect for any moment, offering a fun and engaging soundtrack for kids' daily adventures. These entertaining and educational tunes captivate young audiences, sparking joy and learning, no matter the activity!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a slide game before watching Becky and Jed look for eggs on their farm. Then their mum cooks them for their tea. In Teletubbyland, the Lion and Bear play their hide and seek game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies march up and down a hill and then they watch some children explore the colour pink. Tinky Winky doesn't know how to make Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa dances with her ball. A little boy tells us why he likes to live in his block of flats. A balloon appears in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies follow a balloon.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky sings a song about his bag and it appears. Dipsy sings a song about his hat and it appears. Laa-Laa sings a song about her ball and it appears. Po sings a song about a cloud and it appears. When the cloud begins to rain, Po runs away.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies love to dance. They watch some children perform in a Ballet Show. Dipsy dances in his bed and Laa-Laa dances whilst making Tubby Custard. Tinky Winky and Po dance and then all the Teletubbies dance together.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies dance, before watching two girls do some Flamenco dancing with their teacher. It's time for the Teletubbies to wash their feet. They love using their Tubby Sponges.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Simone and Cacha help make colourful costumes. Laa-Laa loves to play with her ball, it bounces everywhere.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky says "Eh-oh". The Teletubbies and some children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be the Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty hat. The Teletubbies are very happy when they find their favourite things to play with.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky calls the other Tubbies to come and watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story about the naughty sock. The Tubby Toast machine makes a tower of tubby toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children learn about the colour blue. In Teletubbyland Po is watching the blue sky when it begins to rain.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Sarah and Mark give their sheep a winter-feed. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies cannot decide whether to have Tubby Custard or Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a jumping dance before stopping to watch Yvette wash up her plastic cups and saucers. The Teletubbies have a very messy day. So Noo-Noo has to tidy everything up.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee summons the Moon Dervish who will bring the Apocalypse unless a sasquatch dances for him. Then, McGee and Squirt have a falling out.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Gretchen, McGee and Squirt get trapped by witch who forces the campers into pizza slave labour. Then, Suzi gives Buttsquat a rare action figure that was sent in a care package meant for McGee.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: McGee vows to protect Lakebottom's supernatural secrets from the prying host. Then, the campers befriend Poe, an elderly, former Lakebottom camper.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: The campers summon Armand's old rival, Doofus the Clown, who vows to destroy the campers. Then, McGee prepares the 'best prank ever'.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Eager to take the 'Scare and Freak Champ' title from Gretchen, McGee accidentally summons Percy, a ghost with a very 'fiery' personality. Then, the Bottomdwellers film Armand's horror masterpiece.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: When McGee, Gretchen and Squirt become lost, deep in the schwamp, McGee and Gretchen argue about the right way back to Lakebottom. Then, Buttsquat challenges the CLB gang to a Capture the Flag game.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: The campers build a race car to help Sawyer relive his pro-racing days. Then, Nanny Num Nums comes to Lakebottom.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Suzi invites her parents for a visit to Camp Lakebottom. Then, the campers train to be Sawyer's Zombie Scouts.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: Squirt is eager to assist his idol, Dr. Sapstein, on his latest quest for the rare mocker bird. Then, McGee discovers a paintbrush that unleashes Sawyer's creative genius.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: When McGee vows to "out rock" Buttsquat for Best Camp Song , he signs a contract with Sheba the Bandshee. Then, McGee's beloved, lucky rubber duck goes missing!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: When Suzi gets bit by the green eyed jealousy bug, she literally turns green with envy. Then, McGee adopts a fire-breathing dragon named Lizzy who proves to be an unruly pet.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: When things start disappearing around Lakebottom, the campers quickly realise McGee's hiccups are the cause. Then, McGee reads a storybook to help Squirt overcome his childhood fear.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom
programme.desc: The campers discover an enchanted flashlight and exchange particularly disturbing tales about the Dripper. Then, McStanger inhabits a post-apocalyptic world.

programme.title: Emma's Dilemma
programme.desc: When Stephanie becomes obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in a float building contest and accidentally disregards Emma's ideas and design, Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to get revenge on Stephanie. When the girls enter a float-building contest, Emma is especially excited to share her design idea for the float. But no one is listening to her, especially Stephanie, who's become obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in the contest. Emma finally does find someone who appreciates her design… Tanya! Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to build the float design. But is Tanya just using Emma to get revenge on Stephanie?

programme.title: Friends of The Jungle
programme.desc: When Olivia's Aunt Sophie is getting married and the groom has gone missing in the jungle, the girls fly out to the jungle in secret to try to find him in time for the wedding. The girls are super excited to be planning a wedding for Olivia's Aunt Sophie. There's just one little problem: Olivia learns that the groom has gone missing in the jungle while working at an animal rescue station! Not wanting to worry her aunt, Olivia, Stephanie and Mia secretly fly to the jungle to try and find the groom, Henry, rescuing a few animals along the way. Too bad Emma and Andrea couldn't keep the secret back in Heartlake City. Now, Sophie, Emma and Andrea join the others in the jungle to try and find Henry before the rapidly approaching wedding date!

programme.title: Can Of Worms
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago. The Ninja are not faring well, when a mysterious Samurai shows up and saves the day.

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: The Golden Castle
programme.desc: When Lance is cast as the star in the new remake of the classic movie “Ned Knightly and the Golden Castle” he doesn't anticipate Jestro and his monsters invading the set and ruining his starring role. It's movie time! Lance does something very Lance: he agrees to star in a movie about remake of a classic film in Knighton: “The Golden Castle.” While pillaging a village, Jestro and the Book of Monsters see a movie poster for “The Golden Castle” and the book says the legendary Golden Castle is filled with riches! Jestro explains that it's just a dumb movie and that it's not real. It's all based on a “script.” The Book, who's been shelved for many years, wants to eat the movie script to learn more about the modern world. On the set of the movie, Lance has invited the other Knights to act as extras. When they see how Lance is being portrayed, they're incensed. When Jestro attacks the movie set to get the script for his book to eat, the film director keeps rolling. This battle footage is fantastic! The Knights defeat Jestro even though the movie set is trashed. The director will make it work. At the premier of the movie, Lance is embarrassed to see that he's been reduced to comic relief for the realm's bravest Knight…Macy! The director has now made her a star.

programme.title: The Maze Of Amazement
programme.desc: The Knights find themselves trapped in a maze looking for the Book of Deception. But will they actually get their hands on it, or will it keep deceiving them? The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl's home town of DIGGINGTON (where they realize that all of Axl's family look just like him.) While they're there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books! It's “The Book of Deception.” They go to find it and discover it ended up under a mountain. And, to make matters worse, the magic book has built a maze around itself to keep it from being found (it is deceptive!) As the NEXO-Knights enter the maze from one side, Jestro enters from the other the Book of Monsters has led him to the maze to get The Book of Deception, too. It's a race through this confusing maze to see who can get the book first. Ava figures out the maze is the Whackman maze from a videogame. After help from Axl's people to defeat Jestro and win the book, the knights discover it's a FAKE BOOK of deception. The Book of Deception created a fake copy of itself!

programme.title: The Black Knight
programme.desc: It seems the NEXO-Knights are attacking villages throughout the realm! But why? A mysterious Black Knight appears to defend the cities from the rogue NEXO-villains! Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they're booed and pelted with food. Why does everyone hate them? To make matters more confusing, a giant Mech Suit in black – The BLACK KNIGHT – appears to defend the kingdom's villages from the fake knights. The Black Knight ends up being very powerful and throws Jestro and his fake knights for a loop. He's cool and mysterious. But when the fake Knights get the better of him, the REAL NEXO-Knights appear to fend them off and learn their deceptive secret. The Knights save the Black Knight and they open him up to find…young ROBIN! (He used a deep, deceptive voice.) The Knights realize that Robin has potential. But maybe he still has some learning to do.

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: Emma's Dilemma
programme.desc: When Stephanie becomes obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in a float building contest and accidentally disregards Emma's ideas and design, Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to get revenge on Stephanie. When the girls enter a float-building contest, Emma is especially excited to share her design idea for the float. But no one is listening to her, especially Stephanie, who's become obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in the contest. Emma finally does find someone who appreciates her design… Tanya! Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to build the float design. But is Tanya just using Emma to get revenge on Stephanie?

programme.desc: The Ultimate Autobot Hunter is unleashed on our heroes.

programme.desc: Led by a new member, Team Prime launches a desperate assault on the Decepticon citadel.

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Decepticons kidnap Bulkhead to assist in Megatron's plan to conquer Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The fate of Earth and Cybertron rests on the Autobots' final battle against Megatron's forces.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Prime tries to resolve a rift between Sumdac and Sari, while Shockwave plans the invasion.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Confident of his ability to finally overcome the Autobots, Megatron challenges Optimus to battle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Tallest Smurf: Smurfs are three apples high. Smurflings are twenty-five smurfberries high. Except for Slouchy, who only measures twenty-two smurfberries. Apart from Baby Smurf, Slouchy is the shortest Smurf, and the jibes and taunts of the other Smurflings make him wish he were the tallest of the Smurfs... Now it so happens that Gourdy the Genie loves to grant wishes...

programme.title: Smurfette's Gift
programme.desc: Every year, Smurfette snoops around to discover what her birthday presents will be before she receives them. But this year, Sassette has created the Keep-Smurfette's-Presents-a-Surprise-Committee. Nat has discovered a cave where they might be able to hide all the gifts prepared by the Smurfs. But what this cave also hides is a greedy imp who is not only interested in keeping Smurfette's gifts...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sassette's Tooth: Oh dear! Sassette has lost a tooth. Papa Smurf explains that if she puts her tooth under her pillow, the Mouse Fairy will bring her a present in the morning. But the next morning there is no present under the pillow. The Mouse Fairy has not been. She has been captured in one of Gargamel's Smurf traps. And now the evil wizard is concocting a dreadful plan.

programme.title: Smurfs On Wheels
programme.desc: Every year, all the Smurfs make the long hike to Dreamy Steamy Springs. But this year, only Grandpa Smurf, Papa Smurf and Nat are going to walk there. All the other Smurfs are too busy – and too lazy – to walk. But then Handy comes up with what he calls his Customised Smurfwagon. No need to walk, you just let yourself roll along... Of course, things won't be as simple as all that.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Calling Dr Smurf: As his name implies, Dabbler Smurf is incapable of staying put in any one activity. He goes from one pursuit to another with the greatest of ease and never finishes what he's begun. But suddenly here he is smitten by the love of the medical profession. Dabbler wants to become a doctor and all of the Smurfs, with Papa Smurf in the lead, are going to help him to achieve his wish.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - All The Smurf's A Stage: Poet Smurf's new play is going to be his greatest work ever, and it will feature the most favourite Smurf of all: Smurfette in the leading female role. All the other Smurfs vie for the honour of playing opposite Smurfette. Even Timid Smurf, who is the shy and retiring type, is a candidate for the part. Brainy Smurf, self-appointed manager of the play, does not see it that way...

programme.title: Reckless Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel's plan cannot fail. Undeterred by Azrael's derisive cackling, the evil wizard perfects a magic substance called Daredevil Dust, which is going to change all the Smurfs into rash, incautious swashbucklers. Will Papa Smurf fall into Gargamel's trap? Will their enemy catch all the Smurfs? Will this story have a happy ending?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Most Popular Smurf: Jokey's surprise exploding packages have been changed by a spell. Picture the practical joker's discombobulating when he realises that all the surprises that he hands to unsuspecting Smurfs contain nothing but real gifts! No more ka-boom, no more jokes, no more fun! Plus the unenviable new position of Most Popular Smurf in the Village, surrounded by admirers begging for more presents...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Three Smurfketeers: In another Smurf theatrical super-production based – very loosely – on Alexandre Dumas' characters, a masterpiece of the stage is created, with a few lines from Romeo and Juliet thrown in.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Christmas: The Smurfs come to the rescue of two children and their grandfather when a mysterious stranger appears and causes their sleigh to crash. Knocking on Gargamel's door for help puts them and the Smurfs in danger…

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Clockwork Smurf: Handy has built a very complex Smurf machine that does everything. It proves dangerous when it nearly destroys the village, but comes in useful when, with the help of the other Smurfs, it saves the young prince Gerard's kingdom from the queen aunt Imperia's dastardly intentions.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Fountain Of Smurf: The Smurfs discover a fountain of youth that is guarded by a wicked troll, who steals Papa Smurf's magic book. They convince Gargamel to help them and the greedy villain runs to get the water, but manages to fall in with the troll. As the two chase each other all over the countryside, the Smurfs are able to retrieve Papa Smurf's book.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Giant: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Once In A Blue Moon: Once in a blue moon, as the legend goes, a baby Smurf is delivered to the Smurfs and everyone in the village becomes attached to the new arrival. But a mistake has been made and the stork returns to take the baby back. Grouchy and Smurfette have become so attached to the baby that the baby is returned.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Supersmurf: Bigmouth steals the Smurfs' winter food supply and Brainy concocts one of Papa Smurf's magic strength potions so he can fight the greedy giant. The super formula wears off, but Papa Smurf works a fast switch, replacing the food with rocks and Bigmouth is none the wiser.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Fake Smurf: Hogatha turns herself into a Smurf, plotting revenge on the little people for destroying her magic locket. Papa Smurf outwits her and banishes her from the forest once more.

programme.title: The Baby Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel turns himself into a Baby Smurf, to be adopted by the Smurfette. He causes complete chaos in the Smurf Village when he tries to blow it up with a time bomb! Papa Smurf discovers his evil plot and uses the explosive to send the wizard back to his dismal castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Haunted Smurf: The Smurfs' winter food supply is destroyed and they journey to a distant castle in search of shelter. Initially, they think the castle is haunted, but after they solve the mystery of a greedy pack of rats, the grateful owner presents them with an abundance of food for their long winter.

programme.title: The Purple Smurfs
programme.desc: The purple fly bites Lazy and an epidemic starts that turns the little villagers into angry, purple Smurfs. Papa Smurf discovers that the pollen from a tuberose flower is an antidote and soon things are smurfy again.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Magnifying Mixture: Brainy makes an enlarging potion that turns Hefty into human size. The big-little strong man captures Gargamel and brings him back to the Smurf Village where Papa Smurf magically causes Azrael to chase his master back to his dreary castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Now You Smurf 'Em, Now You Don't: The underground trolls who want them to be their slaves capture the Smurfs. Papa Smurf ingeniously frees them and then destroys the trolls' magic crystal ball that gives them power over the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Rabbids Olympics.
programme.desc: Our two scientists put some Rabbids to the test to see if they have the right stuff for a trip to the moon…

programme.title: Rabbid Obsession.
programme.desc: The rabbids have decided to reach the moon... thanks to a big ladder.

programme.title: The Rabbids land at the North Pole.
programme.desc: Taking pity on a pack of frozen fish, the rabbids decide to set it free and embark on a risky mission.

programme.title: The Rabbids are misunderstood artists.
programme.desc: By accident, the rabbids destroy the teleporta-TV.

programme.title: The Rabbids aim for the moon!
programme.desc: The only way for rabbids to get into their rocket to reach the moon is to go on a drastic diet!

programme.title: Rabbid Obsession.
programme.desc: The rabbids have decided to reach the moon... thanks to a big ladder.

programme.title: Rabbids at your service!
programme.desc: A rabbid gets ejected from his rocket as it crashes, and takes the place of a guide dog.

programme.title: The Rabbids go to the Moon.
programme.desc: To fight against boredom, the rabbids launch a competition of strange noises.

programme.title: The Rabbids are missing!
programme.desc: When a pilot rabbid disappears, a detective rabbid starts to investigate…

programme.title: The Rabbids are escaping!
programme.desc: John the scientist is trapped inside a rabbid's body, and gets thrown into the junkyard.

programme.title: Rabbid Hibernation and the time machine.
programme.desc: After it breaks down in the middle of the desert, Hibernation Rabbid's Machine is stolen by the rabbids.

programme.desc: A fast talking, travelling salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik various hedgehog-catching gadgets, including the Darkenator, the Super-duper Gravity Stopper, and the De-Atomizer.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.sub-title: Blast to the Past Part II
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina, but are unable to prevent Robotnik from roboti-sizing Uncle Chuck or from relegating the King to the Void. After they return to the present, Sonic laments that the trip was a waste, but Sally reminds him that they came close and they will keep trying until they do triumph over Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea-beast.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.
