programme.title: Who Gets the Dog?
programme.desc: A couple going through a divorce squabble over custody of their beloved dog.

programme.title: Yes, God, Yes
programme.desc: Growing up in the Midwest in the early OOs, sixteen-year-old Alice has always been a good Catholic. But when an innocent AOL chat turns racy, she discovers masturbation and is overwhelmed with guilt. Seeking redemption, she attends a mysterious religious retreat to try and suppress her urges...

programme.title: A Good Old Fashioned Orgy
programme.desc: A Comedy About Old Friends In New Positions. A Good Old-Fashioned Orgy is about a close group of 30-somethings who spend every weekend of the summer throwing elaborate parties at the house belonging to group member Eric in the Hamptons.

programme.title: The Legend of Barney Thomson
programme.desc: Comedy drama as Robert Carlyle plays Barney Thomson, a downtrodden barber who has fallen from grace in his meagre barbering life. One day whilst almost losing his job, Barney comically falls into the unthinkable role of a serial killer.

programme.title: I'll Be Next Door For Christmas
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Nickey's boyfriend visits for the holidays, she hides her family's extreme Christmas obsession by staging a fake dinner next door with hired actors as her parents. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: MXP: Most Xtreme Primate
programme.desc: Jack's back and he's taking his skills in the half-pipe to the frosty peaks of Colorado. Jack teams up with two snowboarding brothers and their dad to turn the whole snowboarding world on its head! Jack's skills take him to where no chimp has ever gone before and it's sure to be a wild ride.

programme.title: A Different Kind Of Christmas
programme.desc: What is like to grow up with a dad who truly believes he's Santa Claus? For Elizabeth Gates (Shelley Long) every kid's dream was her worst nightmare…and it's not over when Dad returns just in time to complicate her run for mayor. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Almost Christmas
programme.desc: Rene and Dennis try one last con in this crazy Christmas comedy starring Paul Rudd, Paul Giamatti and Sally Hawkins.

programme.title: Danger Close: The Battle Of Long Tan
programme.desc: (2019) War drama with Travis Fimmel. Outnumbered and outgunned, a band of 108 inexperienced Australian and New Zealand soldiers hold off 2,500 enemy troops during a downpour in Vietnam.

programme.title: The Battle of Britain
programme.desc: (2001) World War Two documentary taking an in-depth look at one of the most pivotal battles of the war, when, after the fall of France, Britain defended its skies against Germany's Luftwaffe.

programme.title: WILD WIND
programme.desc: An allied commando unit is created to destroy a train loaded with Nazi soldiers during World War Two

programme.title: HELL RIVER
programme.desc: Yugoslavian freedom fighters clash with the Nazis that invaded their homeland.

programme.title: Who Gets the Dog?
programme.desc: A couple going through a divorce squabble over custody of their beloved dog.

programme.title: Blair Witch
programme.desc: 20 years after his sister vanished in the Black Hills Forest while researching the legend of the Blair Witch, James and his friends venture into the forest in search of her.

programme.title: Arctic Void
programme.desc: When almost everyone vanishes from a tourist ship in the Arctic, a dark truth emerges that forces the three who remain to ally or perish.

programme.title: Into The Blue 2: The Reef
programme.desc: Free-spirited scuba divers Sebastion and Dani run a modest diving company in Hawaii. The young couple is delighted when they're hired by mysterious jet-setters who are searching for sunken treasure and will pay big money for diving help.

programme.title: Nightmare Nurse
programme.desc: When a woman and her boyfriend are injured in a car crash, he is left with a leg injury which requires them to hire a nurse, but the woman they select is more trouble than she appears.

programme.title: Nightmare Nurse
programme.desc: When a woman and her boyfriend are injured in a car crash, he is left with a leg injury which requires them to hire a nurse, but the woman they select is more trouble than she appears.

programme.title: Willow Creek
programme.desc: Jim and his girlfriend Kelly are visiting the infamous Willow Creek, the alleged home of the original Bigfoot legend - the tale of huge ape like creatures that roam the forests of North America. Deep in the dark and silent woods, isolated and hours from human contact, neither Kelly or Jim are prepared for what is hidden between the trees, and what happens when the cameras start rolling...

programme.title: Willow Creek
programme.desc: Jim and his girlfriend Kelly are visiting the infamous Willow Creek, the alleged home of the original Bigfoot legend - the tale of huge ape like creatures that roam the forests of North America. Deep in the dark and silent woods, isolated and hours from human contact, neither Kelly or Jim are prepared for what is hidden between the trees, and what happens when the cameras start rolling...

programme.title: The Culling
programme.desc: When a group of college friends head out of town for a fun-filled long weekend, their plans change after finding a 7-year-old girl alone at an empty cafe along the highway and have no choice but to drive her home. When they arrive at her house it's quickly apparent they will have to stay the night - but what's not apparent is the living nightmare that they're about to encounter.

programme.title: The Culling
programme.desc: When a group of college friends head out of town for a fun-filled long weekend, their plans change after finding a 7-year-old girl alone at an empty cafe along the highway and have no choice but to drive her home. When they arrive at her house it's quickly apparent they will have to stay the night - but what's not apparent is the living nightmare that they're about to encounter.

programme.title: Holy Water
programme.desc: A group of friends in an Irish village steal a load of Viagra to improve their finances. But what seemed like a simple plan turns into a comic disaster.

programme.title: Holy Water
programme.desc: A group of friends in an Irish village steal a load of Viagra to improve their finances. But what seemed like a simple plan turns into a comic disaster.

programme.title: An American Werewolf In London
programme.desc: David Kessler and Jack Goodman arrive in Northern England for a walking tour. One night, a beast attacks them, killing Jack. Weeks later Jack returns to warn David that a werewolf was their assailant and that he is now the last of the werewolves!

programme.title: Memoirs Of An Invisible Man
programme.desc: When a government experiment goes awry it renders an innocent bystander invisible.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In America
programme.desc: Sergio Leone's final film is the epic tale of the life of a Jewish gangster in New York.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: The Four Horsemen resurface, and are recruited by a tech genius to pull off their most impossible heist yet.

programme.title: The Next Three Days
programme.desc: A family man finds his world turned upside down when his wife is convicted of murdering her boss.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: A police psychologist works to talk down an ex-con who is threatening to jump from a Manhattan hotel rooftop.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: The Four Horsemen resurface, and are recruited by a tech genius to pull off their most impossible heist yet.

programme.title: There Are Monsters
programme.desc: There Are Monsters is a feature length horror based upon the apocalyptic premise that the world is being taken over - slowly, quietly and efficiently - by creatures that look exactly like us. The story follows a graduate-student film crew who, on a work-related road trip, discover evidence of these doppelgangers.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: In 1978, one film changed the face of cinema forever. Long established as one of the most debated and divisive movies of all time, I Spit On Your Grave has been condemned by some as 'vile and depraved', whilst others hail it as a 'misunderstood masterpiece of cinema', 'the ultimate feminist movie'. Re-experience the phenomenon that shocked and divided the world, and influenced an entire genre and generation of film-makers, with Camille Keaton's portrayal of young writer Jennifer Hills, her horrific plans for revenge, and some of the most gruesomely, unforgettable scenes ever captured to film.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave: Deja Vu
programme.desc: Finally, after 1978's I Spit On Your Grave shocked the world with its story of a beautiful career woman assaulted and left for dead, and her notorious revenge on those responsible, cinema's most lethal Lady Vengeance returns in the most anticipated sequel of all time. Reuniting star Camille Keaton and original director Meir Zarchi, I Spit On Your Grave: Deja Vu sends now successful writer Jennifer Hills hurtling back to where it all began - to face the wrath of the families of those she murdered. Kidnapped along with her daughter Christy, it's a tense game of hunt - or be hunted - against a ruthless gang of degenerates and their violently unhinged matriarch, Becky. Hailed as a feminist revenge masterpiece by some, and misunderstood as crude exploitation by others, revenge is about to come full circle in Deja Vu, the final chapter in cinema's most shocking cult franchise.

programme.title: Rupture
programme.desc: Young mother Renee (Noomi Rapace, The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo) is randomly abducted and taken to a secret lab, where she is traumatically experimented on. She must uncover why she is chosen and escape her prison. Also starring Michael Chiklis (The Shield), Peter Stormare (Fargo) and Lesley Manville (Maleficent). A brilliantly disorientating thriller from the acclaimed Director of (Secretary).

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Starring Morgan Freeman and John Cusack comes a twisty, slick and intelligent crime thriller full of action, suspense mystery and intrigue. Cusack plays Ray Keene, a father who, during a hiking trip with his son in the wilderness, is suddenly forced into a dangerous rescue mission when a notorious assassin, Frank Cordell, washes downriver handcuffed to a dying US Marshall.

programme.title: Death Trench
programme.desc: In the final days of WWI a shell-shocked tunneller leads an Allied team into a hidden German base... one hundred feet below the trenches. The Germans have lost control of a highly contagious biological weapon that turns its victims into deranged killers. The Allies find themselves trapped underground with hordes of the infected, a rapidly spreading disease and a team of German Stormtroopers dispatched to clean up the mess

programme.title: The Bunker
programme.desc: This nighmareish horror will have you running towards the nearest exit. When Ella (Mischa Barton) discovers her Wall Street banker boyfriend is renting a secret storage unit, she becomes suspicious. Breaking in with her friend Molly (Emily Atack) they discover something sinister. Now trapped in the darkened building with a bunch of neurotic strangers, they must fight for their lives. Unmissable!

programme.title: Open 24 Hours
programme.desc: After surviving and killing her serial killer boyfriend, a young woman rebuilds her life with a new job at an all-night gas station. Haunted by visions of her boyfriend's crimes and delusions of his imminent return, what seems like a routine night becomes one of mayhem and murder. As the bodies start to pile up, will she survive the night?

programme.title: 14 Love Letters
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Vanessa Sears. When mysterious love letters appear in her mailbox, a woman embarks on a heartfelt quest -finding love where she least expects it.

programme.title: The Way To The Heart
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Meghan Heffern. When a big-city chef loses her spark, her boss insists she takes a break to find herself again. Will a visit to her hometown help her rediscover her passions?

programme.title: Tell Me I Love You
programme.desc: Desperate for money, three best friends devise an outrageous plan to get married and inherit money from a trust fund. Starring Kaniehtiio Horn (2019)

programme.title: Blue Moon Ball
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Ashley Newbrough and Eric Lutz. While back in her hometown to finish her book, a novelist helps her ex save the town's historic ballroom - but can she write her own happy ending?

programme.title: Charm of Love
programme.desc: (2020) Romance with Katrina Norman. An art historian searching for an ancient relic meets a hotelier who helps her explore the area. As sparks fly between them, will she continue to bury her feelings?

programme.title: Aristotle and Dante
programme.desc: Mexican teenagers Aristotle Mendoza and Dante Quintana explore their friendship while struggling with racial and ethnic identity, sexuality and family relationships in 1987 El Paso, Texas. Based on the book by Benjamin Alire Sáenz

programme.title: Elvis And Anabelle
programme.desc: After a miracle, a beauty queen and a small town boy are thrown together in this life affirming story of young love.

programme.title: Alone Together
programme.desc: Two strangers wind up double-booked in the same New York rental at the start of quarantine. Exasperating the situation, these polar opposites must learn to cope with each other's eccentricities, realizing they have more in common than meets the eye.

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: A womanizing Viagra salesman with no sense of direction or responsibility falls in love with a free-spirited woman.

programme.title: A Good Woman
programme.desc: The seductive Mrs. Erlynne (Helen Hunt) travels to Amalfi, Italy, hoping to win over married aristocrat Robert Windermere. But when Windermere's innocent wife Meg (Scarlett Johansson) hears of the scandal, she plots an elaborate revenge.

programme.title: Under the Mistletoe
programme.desc: Starring Jaime Ray Newman, Michael Shanks, and Conan Graham. At Christmas, the tables turn on a selfless single mom when a local radio station takes over her love life after an innocent call from her 8-year-old son.

programme.title: Christmas on Mistletoe Lake
programme.desc: Reilly finds herself in the magical town of Mistletoe Lake. She accepts the offer of Ray to stay in his boat, helping him renovate for the town's Christmas Harbor Festival. Reilly embarks on a journey to save the towns she fell in love with.

programme.title: Christmas Wedding Runaway
programme.desc: A runaway bride does some soul-searching when she's trapped in a snowed-in cabin with her grandmother and an old flame at Christmas.

programme.title: Mary 4 Mayor
programme.desc: Running for mayor against her incumbent mayor father, an eighteen-year-old young woman learns valuable life lessons that not only are the building blocks to saving her family, but also the town she lives in.

programme.title: Quest For Love
programme.desc: Mackenzie travels to Costa Rica for work. Her best friend Ethan comes along to get romantic inspiration for his action /adventure novel. Mackenzie has loved Ethan for a long time, but he only sees her as a friend--until a tourist named Lucas makes Ethan see Mackenzie in a new light.

programme.title: The Beautiful Beast
programme.desc: The classic Beauty and the Beast tale told with a twist! Isabelle is all beauty - on the outside. When she gets lost on a skiing vacation, she is helped by Jeremy, a man hiding from the world and his past. He's the first person to put Isabelle in her place, and Isabelle realizes she might be more beast than she wants to admit. Through Jeremy's influence she begins to change - and fall in love.

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Reality TV star Ann Stanway leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she discovers friendship, new love and ultimately herself. In the end, Ann must decide between staying in her newfound reality or returning to her old one.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: Passionate fashion stylist Rose is in her 30s and living in New York. When she inherits her grandmother's vintage dress shop, she returns to her small hometown to take care of the store and bumps into her high school crush Cole.

programme.title: The Boy She Met Online
programme.desc: Cami Winters, a teen, secretly falls for online boy, Jake.

programme.title: Sarah / Ellen / Sherman and Dee Ann
programme.desc: A heavily pregnant woman is viciously attacked.

programme.title: Deadly Influencer
programme.desc: Skylar is obsessed with managing online social media "influencer" careers.

programme.title: Cyberstalker
programme.desc: 13 years ago, an online stalker shattered Aiden's world by murdering her parents.

programme.title: The Boy She Met Online
programme.desc: Cami Winters, a teen, secretly falls for online boy, Jake.

programme.title: Dying for the Crown
programme.desc: A new student at a high school stops at nothing to gain popularity and become homecoming queen at the prom.

programme.title: Killer on the Island
programme.desc: On vacation with her husband, a woman suspects a local of multiple murders and fears she's next.

programme.title: Murder at the Mansion
programme.desc: As her wedding day approaches, a woman uncovers some deadly secrets hidden at her fiancé's lush family estate.

programme.title: Murder in the Vineyard
programme.desc: When a teenager is hazed at a party by anonymous bullies, her mother sets out to protect her.

programme.title: Anger Management (2003)
programme.desc: A timid businessman is wrongly sentenced to an anger management program, where he has his life turned upside-down by an ultra-agressive instructor who hardly practices what he preaches.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: From the guys who brought you PAUL BLART: MALL COP, five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: The all-star comedy cast from "Grown Ups" returns with some exciting new additions!

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: After eating from the Tree of Knowledge, a primitive villager/slacker flees his people and encounters murderous Cain, slave traders, charismatic nutcase Abraham, and finally the city of Sodom. There the man falls for a princess, is hailed as "the chosen" by the oppressed people and ultimately leads a revolt that topples the government and frees the slaves. He heads off with the princess to visit Egypt....

programme.title: God Made Them... I Kill Them
programme.desc: A bounty-hunter (Dean Reed) is hired by the residents of a small town on the Mexican border to stop a series of gold robberies by marauding outlaws who are coordinated by the town's corrupt banker.

programme.title: Alien Thunder
programme.desc: Based on an actual event, this is the tragic story of Saskatchewan fugitive Almighty Voice (Gordon Tootoosis), a Cree Indian who is arrested for stealing government livestock out of desperate hunger.

programme.title: Pawnee
programme.desc: Pale Arrow is a white man raised since a boy by the Pawnee Chief. With wagon trains now encroaching on Pawnee land, the Chief sends Pale Arrow to be with the white people.

programme.title: Mackenzie's Raiders EP01-04
programme.desc: Colonel Mackenzie, commander of the 4th Cavalry Regiment at Fort Clark near Brackettville in Kinney County in southwest Texas during the 1870s, receives secret orders from President Ulysses S. Grant and Secretary of War William W. Belknap to stop bandits from crossing the Rio Grande into the United States, or from returning to Mexico.

programme.title: Find the Lady
programme.desc: When a pretty model spends New Year's Eve investigating the disappearance of her grandmother she is drawn into a sinister web of theft, kidnapping and, finally, murder.

programme.title: Circus of Fear
programme.desc: Following an audacious theft of banknotes, Inspector Elliott of Scotland Yard poses as a photographer to visit the circus from which some of the banknotes have come into circulation.

programme.title: Passport to Shame
programme.desc: When the innocent-faced Malou, having been framed with a crime in Paris, arrives at a sordid brothel in England, it seems that she is condemned to a miserable and soul-destroying life...

programme.title: Death Line
programme.desc: Prominent people have been disappearing from tube stations and an MI5 agent is brought in to help solve the mysterious goings-on. What is the terrible secret of the underground system? Who or what is turning the London Underground into a Death Line?

programme.title: Beast Must Die
programme.desc: Millionaire big game hunter Tom Newcliffe assembles an odd assortment of guests at his hunting lodge with the purpose of tracking down the biggest game of all - a werewolf.

programme.title: HORROR MATE
programme.desc: One day, a crisis befalls the brilliant high school students Minhoon, Siwoo, and Hyun, who were creating a horror game. Ghost characters from their game 'Horror Mate' have suddenly come to life in the real world! They must tackle each game stage one by one in order to capture the ghosts!

programme.title: Cadaver
programme.desc: The anatomy class is not finished yet!

programme.title: Whispering Corridors 6 : The Humming
programme.desc: Ha-young hears humming in the empty washroom and believes that Eun-hee, who was hired as a vice-principal of the school is somehow linked to the mystery.

programme.title: Vampire Cop Ricky
programme.desc: Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall.

programme.title: I am The King
programme.desc: A bookish prince swaps lives with a slave, leading to chaos and his rise as King in a comic twist of fate.

programme.title: The Plan Man
programme.desc: A meticulous librarian's love plan is shaken by a free-spirited musician pushing him to face the world.

programme.title: Too Hot To Die
programme.desc: Three men in a suicide club find hope and new purpose when a mysterious woman joins and changes everything.

programme.title: Ten Months
programme.desc: Mi-rae a twentysomething game engineer finds out that the hangover was actually her body being pregnant.

programme.title: Robot Overlords
programme.desc: The adults lost the war and now the kids must save the world! Robots rule the streets and the people are locked in their homes. Stepping outside risks being vaporised by a hulking Sentry or picked off by a lethal Sniper.

programme.title: Settlers
programme.desc: Following ecological disaster, a family from Earth do what they must to survive on a desolate Mars homestead.

programme.title: Parallel
programme.desc: A group of friends stumble upon a mirror that serves as a portal to a "multiverse", but soon discover that importing knowledge from the other side in order to better their lives brings increasingly dangerous consequences.

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: PREDESTINATION chronicles the life of a Temporal Agent (Ethan Hawke) sent on an intricate series of time-travel journeys designed to stop crimes before they are committed.

programme.title: Christmas Joy
programme.desc: (2018) Christmas romance with Danielle Panabaker. Market researcher Joy is about to get a sweet promotion, but when she's called back to her hometown, will she find an even sweeter reason to stay?

programme.title: Jingle Around the Clock
programme.desc: (2018) Holly-jolly rom-com starring Brooke Nevin. An ad exec's Christmas dreams take a turn when she's forced to team up with her rival on a career-altering project.

programme.title: A Christmas To Cherish
programme.desc: (2019) Heartwarming holiday drama with Peter Porte. A couple preparing to celebrate the perfect Christmas together must swap the fireside eggnog for a fight to save the beloved local community centre.

programme.title: A Very Country Christmas
programme.desc: (2017) Festive romance with Greyston Holt. A singer escapes the chaos of Hollywood to rediscover his love for country music. But what he stumbles upon is even better.

programme.title: Christmas Confessions
programme.desc: (2015) Romance with Sarah Lancaster. When an out-of-work actress returns to her hometown for Christmas after a decade away, she finds love and friendship. Will she see what's truly important in life?

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: In the worlds before Monkey, primal chaos reigned. Heaven sought order. Tathagata Buddha, the Father Buddha said, "With our thoughts, we make the world." From the New World came a stone monkey. The nature of Monkey was irrepressible!

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: Nine Dozen Heroes and One Wicked Man
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: Both at last Will Reach the Sea
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The Angels (Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore & Lucy Liu) go head-to-head with Angel-Gone-Bad!

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon, the Accident Man, is a stone cold killer, he is the best at what he does. But when a loved one is dragged into the London underworld and murdered by his own crew, Fallon is forced to rip apart the life he knew in order to avenge the one person who actually meant something to him.

programme.title: The Marksman (2005)
programme.desc: An action-packed, gripping espionage movie starring Wesley Snipes. The U.S. is tricked into targeting an armed nuclear reactor captured by Chechen rebels, but a Special Ops team, up by Snipes, figures a way to stop disaster from happening.

programme.title: The Good Lie
programme.desc: Orphaned during the Sudanese Civil War, a group of young refugees are given the opportunity to leave their camp and resettle in America.

programme.title: Minamata
programme.desc: Photojournalist W. Eugene Smith (Johnny Depp) travels to a city ravaged by mercury poisoning, the result of decades of gross corporate negligence.

programme.title: Jobs
programme.desc: Ashton Kutcher is Steve Jobs, the iconic Apple innovator and groundbreaking entrepreneur. This inspiring and entertaining film chronicles Jobs early days as a college dropout, to his rise as the co-founder of Apple Computer Inc.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Conan The Barbarian
programme.desc: The most legendary Barbarian of all time is back. A quest that begins as a personal vendetta for the fierce Cimmerian warrior soon turns into an epic battle against hulking rivals, horrific monsters, and impossible odds, as Conan realizes he is the only hope of saving the great nations of Hyboria.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Jack Regan (Ray Winstone) and his loyal partner George Carter (Ben Drew) are old school crime fighters enforcing the law in a modern underworld.
